verifications.sub_question: Who was John V, Prince Of Anhalt-Zerbst's father?
verifications.original_hypothesis: [Hypothesis Answer: Frederick Augustus Albrecht, Prince of Anhalt-Zerbst]
verifications.evidence: "John was the second (but eldest surviving) son of Ernest I, Prince of Anhalt-Dessau, by his wife Margarete, daughter of Henry I, Duke of Münsterberg-Oels, and granddaughter of George of Poděbrady, King of Bohemia."

iterations.updated_memory: Q: Who was John V, Prince Of Anhalt-Zerbst's father? | A: Ernest I, Prince of Anhalt-Dessau | Evidence: "John was the second (but eldest surviving) son of Ernest I, Prince of Anhalt-Dessau, by his wife Margarete, daughter of Henry I, Duke of Münsterberg-Oels, and granddaughter of George of Poděbrady, King of Bohemia."

final_memory: Q: Who was John V, Prince Of Anhalt-Zerbst's father? | A: Ernest I, Prince of Anhalt-Dessau | Evidence: "John was the second (but eldest surviving) son of Ernest I, Prince of Anhalt-Dessau, by his wife Margarete, daughter of Henry I, Duke of Münsterberg-Oels, and granddaughter of George of Poděbrady, King of Bohemia."
